text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s Army spokesperson Brigadier General Mohammad Akraminia: 📌 “We do not consider the war to be over. During both the fighting and the ceasefire, we updated our target bank.” 📌 “Some of our equipment was being produced even during the war — meaning it was built one day and used the next.” Video is made by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗军队发言人穆罕默德·阿克拉米尼亚准将：📌 “我们并不认为战争已经结束。在战斗和停火期间，我们都更新了我们的目标库。” 📌 “我们的一些装备甚至在战争期间还在生产——这意味着它们今天制造，明天就投入使用。” 视频由 Grok AI 制作 tweet

text: WarTranslated An ordinary Russian, Sergey Marchenko, joined the "smo" thinking he would earn some money and everything would be great. He was the only survivor from his group, and now he needs rehabilitation that he can't afford. He also received no compensation for his concussion. Now he sits around complaining that war is terrifying and that he wouldn't wish it even on his worst enemy. How ironically things turned out for Sergey. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一名普通的俄罗斯人谢尔盖·马尔琴科加入了“特别军事行动”，以为能赚点钱，一切都会很好。他是他们小组中唯一的幸存者，现在他需要他负担不起的康复治疗。他也没有因为脑震荡获得任何赔偿。现在他到处抱怨战争太可怕了，他甚至不希望他最坏的敌人经历这些。谢尔盖的遭遇真是讽刺。 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump stated that Iran has informed the United States it is in a “state of collapse” and wants the Strait of Hormuz reopened “as soon as possible,” while it works to resolve internal leadership issues. ▪️ Notably, around ten days earlier, Trump had claimed that Iran had agreed to all U.S. conditions — including reopening the strait, removing enriched uranium, and halting enrichment — though those claims were later contradicted. ▪️ He has since effectively extended the ultimatum toward Iran without a clear deadline. Video is made by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗已通知美国，它处于“崩溃状态”，并希望“尽快”重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，同时努力解决内部领导层问题。 ▪️ 值得注意的是，大约十天前，特朗普曾声称伊朗已同意美国的所有条件——包括重新开放海峡、移除浓缩铀和停止浓缩——尽管这些说法后来被反驳。 ▪️ 此后，他实际上延长了对伊朗的最后通牒，但没有明确的截止日期。 视频由 Grok AI 制作 tweet

text: Open Source Intel WILD STORY 🔴 12 year old Lebanese girl messages Israeli Arabic Army spokesman asking him to bomb her school. She wrote: “Listen brother, I want to give you very important information. In Choueifat National College school, there are Hezbollah weapons, a rocket launcher room, and shelters underground with weapons. I wanted to give you this information, the rest is up to you.” Reports say the student sent the message to Avichay Adraee because she did not want to attend classes. Israeli drones later flew over the area, causing panic among residents. The school said it requested a security investigation involving the girl and her family, warning legal action against anyone harming the school’s reputation. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 疯狂的故事 🔴 一名 12 岁的黎巴嫩女孩给以色列阿拉伯军队发言人发信息，要求他轰炸她的学校。她写道：“听着，兄弟，我想给你提供非常重要的信息。在舒韦法特国家学院学校里，有真主党的武器、一个火箭发射器室，地下还有藏有武器的掩体。我想把这些信息给你，剩下的就看你了。” 据报道，这名学生给阿维查伊·阿德雷发了这条信息，因为她不想上课。以色列无人机随后飞越该地区，引起居民恐慌。校方表示，已要求对该女孩及其家人进行安全调查，并警告将对任何损害学校声誉的人采取法律行动。 tweet

text: Faytuks News RT @FaytuksNetwork : Trump says Iran wants the U.S. to open the Strait of Hormuz because Iran is in a "State of Collapse." https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2049124882085040627/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News RT @FaytuksNetwork : 特朗普称伊朗希望美国开放霍尔木兹海峡，因为伊朗处于“崩溃状态”。 https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2049124882085040627/photo/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix Excellent move The German Armed Forces to seek alternatives to Palantir. The German military will not award contracts to U.S. data analytics and defense software company Palantir for ‌now, according to comments in the Handelsblatt newspaper by the officer in charge of cyber defense. Thomas Daum said the German Armed Forces did not want to share their data with Palantir. - DW Politics tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 绝妙的一招 德国武装部队寻求 Palantir 的替代方案。据《商报》援引负责网络防御的军官的评论称，德国军方目前不会与美国数据分析和国防软件公司 Palantir 签订合同。托马斯·道姆表示，德国武装部队不想与 Palantir 分享他们的数据。 - DW Politics tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Trump bullies and coerces allies to take more responsibility. They do, and America loses leverage. Then Trump gets angry when he realizes he has less ability to bully and coerce. It’s happening in Ukraine and across (certain parts of) Europe. 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 The U.S. is no longer the leader! Germany has overtaken America in production capacity And this is one of the most telling shifts in the West’s defense race. The head of Rheinmetall said the company is growing at explosive rates. By 2030, it plans to expand its workforce to 70,000 and increase artillery shell production from 70,000 to over one million per year. Europe is rapidly ramping up its own military industry and is becoming less dependent on the U.S. It seems this is exactly what Trump’s team was aiming for. - NEXTA tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : 特朗普欺凌并强迫盟友承担更多责任。他们照做了，美国却失去了影响力。然后，当特朗普意识到自己欺凌和强迫的能力减弱时，他变得愤怒。这种情况正在乌克兰和欧洲（某些地区）发生。 🇺🇸 🇩🇪 美国不再是领导者！德国在生产能力上已经超越了美国，这是西方国防竞赛中最具说明性的转变之一。莱茵金属公司的负责人表示，该公司正以爆炸性的速度增长。到 2030 年，它计划将员工人数扩大到 70,000 人，并将炮弹年产量从 70,000 发增加到超过 100 万发。欧洲正在迅速加强自己的军事工业，并减少对美国的依赖。这似乎正是特朗普团队的目标。 - NEXTA tweet

text: Nuno Felix Day 15 of a 13 day death spiral according to FDD When your enemy is in a death spiral, let it happen. And be ready. - Richard Goldberg tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 根据 FDD 的说法，这是 13 天死亡螺旋的第 15 天。当你的敌人处于死亡螺旋中时，让它发生。并做好准备。 - 理查德·戈德堡 tweet

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says Iran has told the U.S., Iran is in a "state of collapse." Adding, that Iran is begging the U.S. to "'open the Hormuz Strait' as soon as possible." tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普称伊朗已告知美国，伊朗处于“崩溃状态”。并补充说，伊朗正在恳求美国“尽快‘开放霍尔木兹海峡’”。 tweet

text: 🇺🇸 Senate Republicans are turning on Pete Hegseth. Multiple GOP senators told The Hill anonymously he couldn't survive a confirmation vote if renominated today. The trigger: forcing out Army Chief of Staff Randy George and firing Navy Secretary John Phelan, moves that blindsided lawmakers with close ties to both men. His feud with Army Secretary Dan Driscoll, a VP Vance loyalist, is compounding the damage. Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC), who voted to confirm him, said Hegseth is "missing the mark on personnel" and questioned whether a man who previously managed "30 or 40 people" can run the Pentagon. He faces House and Senate Armed Services Committee hearings this week where the firings will dominate. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 参议院共和党人正在背弃皮特·赫格塞斯。多位共和党参议员匿名告诉《国会山报》，如果今天重新提名，他无法在确认投票中幸存。导火索是：强行罢免陆军参谋长兰迪·乔治和解雇海军部长约翰·费伦，这些举动让与两人关系密切的议员感到措手不及。他与万斯副总统的忠实拥护者、陆军部长丹·德里斯科尔之间的不和加剧了损害。投票确认他任职的参议员汤姆·蒂利斯（北卡罗来纳州共和党人）表示，赫格塞斯在“人事问题上偏离了目标”，并质疑一个此前只管理过“30 或 40 人”的人是否能管理五角大楼。他本周将面临众议院和参议院军事委员会的听证会，解雇事件将成为焦点。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Christian Turner, Britain’s ambassador in Washington, said in leaked private remarks that the United States’ only real “special relationship” is probably with Israel rather than the UK. Source: FT
text_zh: 英国驻华盛顿大使克里斯蒂安·特纳在泄露的私人言论中表示，美国唯一真正的“特殊关系”可能与以色列有关，而不是与英国。来源：金融时报

text: Timothy Ash | Russia & Eurasia Expert | Chatham House: Türkiye's first decade under Erdoğan was a real reform agenda - anchored by EU accession & the IMF program. There was record foreign investment, investment grade rating & the only time the central bank hit its 5% inflation target. The EU anchor drove that. It went off track when France & Germany started talking about a "privileged partnership." Türkiye realized it wasn't a level playing field. Bulgaria & Romania were let in to EU despite being poorer & having serious rule of law issues, while Türkiye brought more to the table. With US disengagement from Europe, I hope Europe finally reawakens to the opportunities of deeper engagement with Türkiye - for Europe's defense & for Türkiye's reform process itself. But first, Europe must battle its own prejudices. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: Timothy Ash | 俄罗斯与欧亚大陆专家 | 英国皇家国际事务研究所：埃尔多安执政的第一个十年是真正的改革议程——以加入欧盟和国际货币基金组织（IMF）计划为锚点。当时有创纪录的外国投资、投资级评级，也是中央银行唯一一次实现5%通胀目标的时候。欧盟的锚定作用推动了这一切。当法国和德国开始谈论“特权伙伴关系”时，一切就偏离了轨道。土耳其意识到这并非公平的竞争环境。保加利亚和罗马尼亚尽管更贫穷且存在严重的法治问题，却被允许加入欧盟，而土耳其带来的价值更高。随着美国从欧洲撤出，我希望欧洲最终能重新意识到与土耳其深化接触所带来的机遇——为了欧洲的防御，也为了土耳其自身的改革进程。但首先，欧洲必须克服自身的偏见。完整采访

text: 🇮🇷 Mr. Helali says hello from the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 赫拉利先生从霍尔木兹海峡向大家问好。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 📝 У самих рыльце в пушку 📝 В Пакистане и Афганистане продолжают вооруженную борьбу Постоянные призывы пакистанцев к деэскалации в иранском конфликте не мешали властям в Исламабаде проводить собственную военную операцию. Боевые действия на границе с Афганистаном , которые вновь начались в феврале, все еще не утихают — хотя интенсивность ударов заметно снизилась на фоне переговоров с китайцами . 🔻 Что происходило за прошедший месяц? ▪️ С конца марта и почти весь апрель бои шли в режиме вязкого приграничного конфликта: обстрелы, удары дронами, короткие перестрелки и постоянные взаимные обвинения. Зонами боевых действия традиционно остаются провинции Хост , Пактика , Кунар и другие территории, расположенные на границе двух стран ▪️ Однако если сравнивать с первыми неделями конфликта в феврале и марте, интенсивность боевых действий за прошедший месяц снизилась. Кроме того, отсутствуют громкие инфоповоды в виде, например, пакистанских прилетов по Кабулу или ударов вглубь как Пакистана, так и Афганистана. ▪️ На это могли повлиять несколько факторов: проведение двусторонних переговоров по урегулированию в Китае , смещение фокуса пакистанцев на организацию диалога между иранцами и американцами и экономический кризис в Пакистане вкупе с нехваткой ресурсов, необходимых для поддерживания темпа боевых действий. ▪️ Несмотря на постоянные взаимные обвинения и продолжающиеся удары — о которых, кстати, чаще всего сообщают именно СМИ Афганистана — дипломатический трек все же не умер. В Китае сумели посадить стороны за стол переговоров и даже добились разговора о комплексном решении , но до реального прорыва дело не дошло. 📌 В Исламабаде все еще продолжают требовать от талибов прекращения поддержки и предоставления «плацдарма для атак» пакистанской «Техрик-е Талибан Пакистан» (запрещена в РФ), которая является одной из главных террористических угроз для страны. В Афганистане не спешат выполнять требования, официально отрицая связи с организацией. 🖍 Проведение же масштабной контртеррористической операции в проблемных приграничных районах Пакистана, которая бы раз и навсегда решила вопрос с ТПП , ограничено нехваткой ресурсов у властей в Исламабаде. Поэтому руководство продолжает прибегать к ограниченной военной кампании в приграничье. ❗️ Так пакистанцы пытаются убить двух зайцев — они показывают населению борьбу с террористами и оказывают давление на талибов. Хотя террористическая угроза так и не решается, да и противоречия с соседом не исчезают . А значит, боевые действия с переменчивой интенсивностью рискуют затянуться, что хорошо видно по обстановке за месяц. 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version #Афганистан #Пакистан ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 自身难保 📝 巴基斯坦和阿富汗继续进行武装斗争。巴基斯坦人不断呼吁在伊朗冲突中缓和局势，但这并没有阻止伊斯兰堡当局进行自己的军事行动。2月份重新开始的阿富汗边境战斗至今仍未平息——尽管在与中国人的谈判背景下，打击强度已明显降低。 🔻 过去一个月发生了什么？ ▪️ 从3月底到整个4月，战斗一直处于胶着的边境冲突模式：炮击、无人机袭击、短暂交火和不断的相互指责。战斗区域传统上仍是霍斯特省、帕克蒂卡省、库纳尔省以及位于两国边境的其他领土。 ▪️ 然而，与2月和3月冲突最初的几周相比，过去一个月的战斗强度有所下降。此外，也没有出现重大的新闻事件，例如巴基斯坦对喀布尔的袭击或对巴基斯坦和阿富汗境内的纵深打击。 ▪️ 这可能受到几个因素的影响：在中国举行双边和解谈判、巴基斯坦将重点转向组织伊朗和美国之间的对话，以及巴基斯坦的经济危机加上维持战斗节奏所需资源的短缺。 ▪️ 尽管存在不断的相互指责和持续的打击——顺便说一句，这些消息大多是由阿富汗媒体报道的——但外交轨道并没有中断。中国成功地让双方坐到了谈判桌前，甚至达成了关于全面解决方案的对话，但尚未取得真正的突破。 📌 伊斯兰堡方面仍在继续要求塔利班停止支持并提供巴基斯坦“巴基斯坦塔利班运动”（TTP，在俄罗斯被禁止）的“攻击跳板”，该组织是该国主要的恐怖威胁之一。阿富汗方面并不急于满足这些要求，并正式否认与该组织有联系。 🖍 在巴基斯坦边境问题地区进行大规模反恐行动以一劳永逸地解决TTP问题，受到伊斯兰堡当局资源短缺的限制。因此，领导层继续在边境地区采取有限的军事行动。 ❗️ 巴基斯坦人试图一箭双雕——他们向民众展示打击恐怖分子的决心，并向塔利班施压。尽管恐怖威胁并未解决，与邻国的矛盾也没有消失。这意味着战斗可能会以不稳定的强度持续下去，这从过去一个月的情况中可以清楚地看出。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 #阿富汗 #巴基斯坦 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.1/prologue of events) On the sunny day of February 28th, U.S. and Israeli aircraft, vessels, and ground systems launched a series of airstrikes starting the “Ramadan War.” Yet almost 57 days later, the Middle East finds itself in a renewed era of No War, No Peace, reminiscent of the Cold War’s troughs and peaks of conflict. It is a battle of religion and destruction: the Jewish-Zionist State of Israel against the Guardianship of the Islamic Jurist, the Islamic Republic of Iran. The conflict showcased the finest of Iran’s internal cohesion. It became a true successor to the "12-Day War," uniting the nation under the “martyred” Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. This unity emerged despite the backdrop of the bloody January demonstrations, where thousands had died at the hands of the same Guardian Jurist while demanding a true democratic republic. Across the region stood Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, intent on eliminating the “Terrorist Mullah Regime” once and for all. For Netanyahu, this was the culmination of an alarm bell he had been ringing since the eighties. Coming off the edge of the October 7 attacks, the 3rd Lebanon War, West Bank settlement expansion, and the Houthi theatre, his first real opportunity arose on June 13th—the 12-Day War. That conflict decimated the IRGC’s nuclear infrastructure and bought Israel the time needed to prepare for a grander operation with U.S. involvement. With the Gaza deal signed and Netanyahu bringing Trump on board, the plan came to fruition. Israel initially sought to strike during the January protests to give momentum to the demonstrators, but the U.S. was not ready; Trump perceived the demonstrators as unready for the vacuum of power. As deliberations dragged on, the window of opportunity began to close. Both sides returned to the drawing board. Even as President Trump ordered a restart of negotiations and Omani Foreign Minister Al-Busadi expressed confidence that war would be avoided, Israeli aircraft were already carrying out simulation strikes. At 9:45 Tehran time on February 28th, Israeli Foreign Minister Israel Katz announced the start of a preemptive strike. Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei died in the opening moments, alongside the upper security echelon that had convened to discuss U.S. technical terms. U.S. strikes followed soon after. However, Iran had anticipated this "treachery." Command had established Dead Hand orders: immediate strikes on pre-set targets the moment war resumed. They stayed true to the order. Explosions were soon heard across the Gulf, from Kuwait to Oman. Simultaneously, Iran began targeting maritime vessels, implementing an effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 冰封的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得了伊朗战争又输掉了战争（第一部分/事件序幕）在2月28日阳光明媚的一天，美国和以色列的飞机、舰艇和地面系统发动了一系列空袭，开启了“斋月战争”。然而近57天后，中东发现自己处于一个新的“无战无和”时代，让人想起冷战时期冲突的低谷和高峰。这是一场宗教与毁灭的较量：犹太复国主义国家以色列对抗伊斯兰法学家监护制度下的伊朗伊斯兰共和国。这场冲突展示了伊朗内部最强大的凝聚力。它成为了“12天战争”的真正继承者，在“殉道”最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊的领导下团结了全国。尽管背景是血腥的1月示威活动，成千上万人在要求真正的民主共和国时死于同一位法学家监护人之手，但这种团结依然出现了。在该地区，以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡决心彻底消灭“恐怖分子毛拉政权”。对内塔尼亚胡来说，这是他自80年代以来一直敲响的警钟的高潮。在10月7日袭击、第三次黎巴嫩战争、西岸定居点扩张和胡塞武装剧场的边缘，他第一个真正的机会出现在6月13日——即“12天战争”。那场冲突摧毁了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的核基础设施，并为以色列争取了时间，为美国参与的更大规模行动做准备。随着加沙协议的签署和内塔尼亚胡拉拢特朗普加入，该计划得以实现。以色列最初试图在1月抗议期间发动袭击，以给示威者提供动力，但美国尚未准备好；特朗普认为示威者尚未准备好填补权力真空。随着审议的拖延，机会之窗开始关闭。双方回到了绘图板前。即使在特朗普总统下令重启谈判、阿曼外交大臣阿尔-布赛迪表示相信可以避免战争时，以色列飞机已经在进行模拟打击。德黑兰时间2月28日9:45，以色列外交部长卡茨宣布开始先发制人的打击。最高领袖阿里·哈梅内伊在开战瞬间身亡，与他一同遇难的还有为讨论美国技术条款而召集的上层安全官员。美国随后的打击紧随其后。然而，伊朗预料到了这种“背叛”。指挥部建立了“死手”指令：战争恢复的瞬间立即对预设目标进行打击。他们忠实地执行了命令。不久，从科威特到阿曼，海湾地区到处都能听到爆炸声。与此同时，伊朗开始瞄准海上船只，对霍尔木兹海峡实施了有效的封锁。 @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) 🛢️ 🇦🇪 The United Arab Emirates announces its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ global oil producer organizations from May 1, 2026. UAE Energy Minister Suhail Mohamed al-Mazrouei told Reuters the decision was taken after a careful look at the regional power's energy strategies. The statement from UAE's state news agency, WAM, reads: "This decision came after a thorough review of the UAE’s production policy and its current and future capacity, and in view of what the national interest requires and the state’s commitment to contribute effectively to meeting the urgent needs of the market, while geopolitical fluctuations continue in the near term through the disturbances in the Arabian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz, which affect supply dynamics, as the basic trends indicate continued growth in global energy demand in the medium and long term." tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）🛢️ 🇦🇪 阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布自2026年5月1日起退出欧佩克（OPEC）及欧佩克+（OPEC+）全球石油生产国组织。阿联酋能源部长苏海尔·穆罕默德·马兹鲁伊（Suhail Mohamed al-Mazrouei）告诉路透社，这一决定是在仔细审视该地区大国的能源战略后做出的。阿联酋国家通讯社（WAM）的声明写道：“这一决定是在对阿联酋的生产政策及其当前和未来产能进行全面审查后做出的，考虑到国家利益的需要，以及国家致力于在短期内地缘政治波动持续的情况下，通过波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的动荡影响供应动态时，有效满足市场紧迫需求，因为基本趋势表明全球能源需求在中长期内将持续增长。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel United Arab Emirates: Iran has been benefiting from OPEC, and no one should be helping that. Very interesting. BREAKING 🔴 The United Arab Emirates, OPEC’s 3rd largest oil producer, announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1. The move would free the UAE from cartel production quotas, allowing it to pump oil at full capacity, set its own export strategy and price crude without group restrictions. That could pave the way for higher UAE output, stronger state revenues and downward pressure on global oil prices. Lower prices and increased supply would likely be welcomed by President Trump, who has long criticized OPEC production limits and called for cheaper energy. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：阿拉伯联合酋长国：伊朗一直从欧佩克中受益，没有人应该帮助这一点。非常有意思。突发 🔴 欧佩克第三大产油国阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+。此举将使阿联酋摆脱卡特尔的生产配额，允许其满负荷开采石油，制定自己的出口战略，并在不受集团限制的情况下为原油定价。这可能为阿联酋提高产量、增加国家收入以及压低全球油价铺平道路。价格下跌和供应增加可能会受到特朗普总统的欢迎，他长期以来一直批评欧佩克的生产限制并呼吁降低能源价格。 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel “UAE leaving OPEC will allow it to meet market needs” - Suhail al-Mazrouei, the United Arab Emirates Minister of Energy. BREAKING 🔴 The United Arab Emirates, OPEC’s 3rd largest oil producer, announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1. The move would free the UAE from cartel production quotas, allowing it to pump oil at full capacity, set its own export strategy and price crude without group restrictions. That could pave the way for higher UAE output, stronger state revenues and downward pressure on global oil prices. Lower prices and increased supply would likely be welcomed by President Trump, who has long criticized OPEC production limits and called for cheaper energy. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：“阿联酋退出欧佩克将使其能够满足市场需求” - 阿拉伯联合酋长国能源部长苏海尔·马兹鲁伊。突发 🔴 欧佩克第三大产油国阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+。此举将使阿联酋摆脱卡特尔的生产配额，允许其满负荷开采石油，制定自己的出口战略，并在不受集团限制的情况下为原油定价。这可能为阿联酋提高产量、增加国家收入以及压低全球油价铺平道路。价格下跌和供应增加可能会受到特朗普总统的欢迎，他长期以来一直批评欧佩克的生产限制并呼吁降低能源价格。 - 开源情报 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 💶 How the EU’s €90 billion aid package will be spent — Ukraine’s Finance Ministry plan: 🟦 The program covers 2026–2027. Of the total, €60 billion will go toward weapons, while €30 billion will support the state budget. ▪️ 2026 plan (Ukraine to receive €45 billion): ➡️ €28.3 billion — for weapons procurement ➡️ €16.7 billion — to cover social spending within the budget deficit (via macro-financial assistance and the Ukraine Facility program) ▪️ 2027 plan (remaining €45 billion): ➡️ €31.7 billion — for weapons ➡️ €13.3 billion — for budget support ▪️ The first funds are expected as early as May–June 2026, with technical consultations on tranche sizes currently ongoing. Video is made by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 💶 欧盟900亿欧元的援助计划将如何使用 — 乌克兰财政部计划： 🟦 该计划涵盖2026–2027年。总额中，600亿欧元将用于武器，300亿欧元将支持国家预算。 ▪️ 2026年计划（乌克兰将获得450亿欧元）： ➡️ 283亿欧元 — 用于武器采购 ➡️ 167亿欧元 — 用于弥补预算赤字内的社会支出（通过宏观金融援助和乌克兰基金计划） ▪️ 2027年计划（剩余450亿欧元）： ➡️ 317亿欧元 — 用于武器 ➡️ 133亿欧元 — 用于预算支持 ▪️ 第一笔资金预计最早于2026年5月至6月到位，目前正在就分期付款规模进行技术磋商。视频由grok AI制作 推文

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 China's Ministry of Foreign Affairs on Japan: Several decades ago, Japan launched a war of aggression, and now it's peddling the so-called tension narrative. Is the Japanese side trying to repeat the history, speed down the path of remilitarization, and once again become the source of disaster in East Asia? Japan has been making frequent, dangerous, reckless, and provocative moves in the military and security fields, defying its self-claimed dedication to peace. The recent remarks by some senior officials in Japan sound more like war mobilization and war cries and are a direct echo of Japanese militarists in the past. Japan has not only failed to do a serious soul-searching of its past wars of aggression but also attempted to resume military expansion. The international community will never accept this. All peace-loving countries in the world must remain highly vigilant and firmly resist Japan's reckless moves of new militarism. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 中国外交部谈日本：几十年前，日本发动了侵略战争，现在却在兜售所谓的紧张局势叙事。日方是想重蹈历史覆辙，在重新军事化的道路上加速，再次成为东亚灾难的源头吗？日本在军事和安全领域频繁采取危险、鲁莽和挑衅的举动，无视其自称的对和平的奉献。日本一些高级官员最近的言论听起来更像是战争动员和战争叫嚣，是过去日本军国主义者的直接回响。日本不仅没有对其过去的侵略战争进行深刻反省，反而试图恢复军事扩张。国际社会绝不会接受这一点。世界上所有爱好和平的国家都必须保持高度警惕，坚决抵制日本新军国主义的鲁莽行径。 推文

text: 🛢 Cumulative oil production shut-ins in the Middle East are already growing exponentially. Unlike simple flow disruptions, this is effectively a permanent loss of global supply. Even if the SoH were to reopen today, we must remember production can only resume after ballast tankers move from the high seas into the Persian Gulf to empty the onshore storage tanks. Yes, this means the confirmed cumulative loss has already surpassed one billion barrels. Good luck. 🔗 CrudeOil231
text_zh: 🛢 中东地区累计石油减产规模已呈指数级增长。与简单的供应中断不同，这实际上是全球供应的永久性损失。即使霍尔木兹海峡今天重新开放，我们也必须记住，只有在压载油轮从公海进入波斯湾并清空陆上储油罐后，生产才能恢复。是的，这意味着已确认的累计损失已经超过了十亿桶。祝好运。 🔗 CrudeOil231

text: Timothy Ash | Russia & Eurasia Expert | Chatham House: Question: Could European reluctance toward Türkiye be just outright racism? There is quite a lot of that. In continental Europe, there is institutional racism against Türkiye. Let's be honest about it. Remember Chirac's comments on Turkish-EU accession - "the French people will decide." Then Sarkozy & Merkel with the privileged partnership. The pattern is clear. The irony - in recent months we saw Türkiye deploy its drone carrier with significant troop deployments in defense of Germany during Baltic military exercises. Türkiye can provide quick solutions to Europe's defense problems. Europe just needs to get over its Türkiye-phobia. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: Timothy Ash | 俄罗斯与欧亚大陆专家 | 查塔姆研究所：问题：欧洲对土耳其的抵触情绪是否纯粹是种族主义？这种情况确实不少。在欧洲大陆，存在针对土耳其的制度性种族主义。让我们诚实一点。还记得希拉克关于土耳其加入欧盟的评论吗——“法国人民将做出决定”。然后是萨科齐和默克尔提出的特权伙伴关系。这种模式很明显。讽刺的是，近几个月来，我们看到土耳其在波罗的海军事演习中部署了无人机航母，并派遣了大量部队保卫德国。土耳其可以为欧洲的国防问题提供快速解决方案。欧洲只需要克服其“土耳其恐惧症”即可。完整采访

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "The Israeli military warns residents of northern Israel that large explosions will be heard in the coming hours as the IDF demolishes a major Hezbollah site in southern Lebanon." May your homes witness the same fate one day

text: Trump: I’ve always wanted to live in Buckingham Palace!!! I’ll talk to the King and Queen about this in a few minutes!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：我一直想住在白金汉宫！！！几分钟后我会和国王与王后谈谈这件事！！！

text: Everyone protecting a generator owner, everyone fought the Lebanese security forces over a citizen who has a court order against him. Yet they want us to submit to this traitorous government and hand our arms to it, hoping it will one day consider us as citizens and protect us in the south? Note: Smoking in the hospital room. Lovely.
text_zh: 每个人都在保护发电机所有者，每个人都为了一个对他有法院传票的公民而与黎巴嫩安全部队对抗。然而，他们却希望我们屈服于这个叛国政府，并向其上交武器，指望它有一天能把我们视为公民并在南部保护我们？注：在病房里抽烟。真棒。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Residents in the Upper Galilee are being warned that within hours, the Northern Command will carry out the destruction of a large weapons infrastructure in southern Lebanon that was located during the war and recently prepared for detonation. The explosion may be detected by alert systems as seismic activity resembling an earthquake. An update is expected minutes before the blast. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 上加利利地区的居民收到警告，称在未来几小时内，北方司令部将摧毁在战争期间发现并最近准备好引爆的黎巴嫩南部大型武器基础设施。爆炸可能会被警报系统检测为类似地震的震动。预计在爆炸前几分钟会有更新。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 The United Arab Emirates, OPEC’s 3rd largest oil producer, announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1. The move would free the UAE from cartel production quotas, allowing it to pump oil at full capacity, set its own export strategy and price crude without group restrictions. That could pave the way for higher UAE output, stronger state revenues and downward pressure on global oil prices. Lower prices and increased supply would likely be welcomed by President Trump, who has long criticized OPEC production limits and called for cheaper energy. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报突发 🔴 欧佩克（OPEC）第三大石油生产国阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布，将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+（OPEC+）。此举将使阿联酋摆脱卡特尔的生产配额限制，能够以满负荷生产石油，制定自己的出口战略，并在不受集团限制的情况下为原油定价。这可能为阿联酋提高产量、增加国家收入以及压低全球油价铺平道路。较低的价格和增加的供应可能会受到特朗普总统的欢迎，他长期以来一直批评欧佩克的生产限制，并呼吁降低能源价格。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel 150,000 dead, 14 million displaced: The story of Sudan’s war An estimated 150,000 people have been killed and more than 14 million displaced. Sudan’s current war has become one of the world’s worst humanitarian disasters, with 2 rival factions, both accused of widespread atrocities, fighting for control of the country. The conflict has just entered its 4th year. It began in April 2023 when a fragile power-sharing arrangement between the Sudanese Armed Forces led by Abdel Fattah al-Burhan and the Rapid Support Forces commanded by Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo collapsed into open warfare. What began as a struggle between 2 former allies has devastated the country. The 2 sides had jointly helped remove former ruler Omar al-Bashir in 2019 and later shared power after a military takeover in 2021. But tensions deepened over plans to merge the RSF into the regular army, command structures, and control of Sudan’s political transition, eventually erupting into war in the capital Khartoum. The conflict has since spread across Darfur, Kordofan and central Sudan. Cities, hospitals, markets and infrastructure have been destroyed, while famine and acute hunger have spread across several regions. Both factions have been accused by rights groups of ethnic killings, rape, looting, indiscriminate attacks and blocking aid. Diplomatically, neither side offers a clean option. The RSF, rooted in the Janjaweed militias tied to past Darfur atrocities, has faced severe accusations of massacres and ethnic killings. The SAF has also been accused of strikes on civilian areas and other abuses. Some Western governments are seen as more open to the RSF, while the SAF faces scrutiny over Islamist influence, Muslim Brotherhood links and Iranian IRGC support. Bottom line, neither side are heroes. And there is no end in sight. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 15万人死亡，1400万人流离失所：苏丹战争的故事 据估计，已有15万人丧生，超过1400万人流离失所。苏丹目前的战争已成为世界上最严重的人道主义灾难之一，两个敌对派系为争夺国家控制权而战，双方均被指控犯有广泛的暴行。这场冲突刚刚进入第4个年头。它始于2023年4月，当时由阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·布尔汉领导的苏丹武装部队与穆罕默德·哈姆丹·达加洛指挥的快速支援部队之间脆弱的权力分享安排崩溃，演变为公开战争。这场始于两个前盟友之间的斗争已经摧毁了这个国家。双方曾共同帮助在2019年推翻了前统治者奥马尔·巴希尔，并在2021年军事接管后分享权力。但关于将快速支援部队并入正规军、指挥结构以及控制苏丹政治过渡的计划，紧张局势加剧，最终在首都喀土穆爆发了战争。此后，冲突蔓延到达尔富尔、科尔多凡和苏丹中部。城市、医院、市场和基础设施遭到破坏，饥荒和严重饥饿蔓延到多个地区。人权组织指控这两个派系犯有种族屠杀、强奸、抢劫、无差别攻击和阻碍援助等罪行。在外交上，双方都不是清白的选择。快速支援部队根植于与过去达尔富尔暴行有关的“金戈威德”民兵组织，面临着大屠杀和种族屠杀的严重指控。苏丹武装部队也因袭击平民区和其他虐待行为而受到指控。一些西方政府被认为对快速支援部队更为开放，而苏丹武装部队则因伊斯兰主义影响、与穆斯林兄弟会的联系以及伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的支持而受到审查。归根结底，双方都不是英雄。而且这场战争看不到尽头。推文
